problem.summary: Compare a custom HIP GEMM with fused bias and activation epilogue against hipBLAS/rocBLAS/hipBLASLt/Composable Kernel baseline paths for scoped shapes.
outputs: D = relu(A * B + bias) for row-major contiguous tensors
constraints: Template-only scaffold; no performance claim is attached
hipBLASLt epilogue and Composable Kernel custom epilogue are mandatory baselines before claiming a custom win
Record layout mapping, math mode, workspace, selected algorithm, and epilogue semantics

verification.method: Compare custom, hipBLASLt/Composable Kernel, and host reference outputs for rectangular shapes that expose bias broadcast errors.

required_metrics: Composable Kernel tile and epilogue operator

curation.notes: Compile-oriented scaffold for epilogue fusion competition; treat results as timing-only only after an actual HIP-event run.
